samples.xml_description:
Implement a module of a 16-bit full adder in combinational logic. 16-bit input operand A. 16-bit input operand B. Carry-in input. 16-bit output representing the sum of A and B. Carry-out output.

Design a module of a 16-bit full adder in combinational logic.

Use two 8-bit adders to implement the 16-bit full adder.

Note: The 16-bit full adder should be implemented using two 8-bit adders. Do not use any other logic.
